---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the project
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What problem would this solve for agents, operators, or contributors?

## Proposed idea

Describe the solution you have in mind.

## Example workflow

Show a short example of how this feature would be used.

## Scope

- [ ] backend
- [ ] frontend
- [ ] docs
- [ ] data
- [ ] API
- [ ] workflow design

## Additional context

Add mockups, references, examples, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
